chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.148 of 2021 Sardar Ahmed and another Versus Kaleem Ahmed and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.2129/2021 (Stay). 4. For hearing of CMA No.2130/2021 (148 CPC)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 15.04.2024 None present..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Since last three dates appellants’ counsel is not attending the matter. On 14.11.2022 it was adjourned only in the interest of justice. Today is a 4th date of hearing when no one is in attendance; there is no intimation either. The appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
